    逻辑说明 / KPI Logic Guide

    All KPI formulas, data sources, and filter logic for this dashboard · 所有指标的数据来源、计算公式及筛选逻辑

    📊 Overview / 总览

    QE Total / QE总数 — All rows in the QE sheet · QE表全量行数

    Open QE — Rows where Status ≠ "Closed" · Status列不为Closed的行

    RTS Intercept Rate / 拦截率 — (Closed + Troubleshooting) / Total · 目标≥70%

    FTFR (Overall / VIP1) — Average of FTFR column in FTFR-Customer sheet; VIP1+SVIP separately · FTFR-Customer均值，目标≥70%

    SLA ≤24h / ≤48h — FTFR-BD (past 90 days): If≤24h or If≤48h=1 / total rows · SVIP ≤24h ≥90%, VIP1 ≤24h ≥80%, VIP2 ≤48h ≥80%

    CS Health Score — CS Score sheet, Score Total average by role · 按CSE/SKA分别取均值，目标≥75分

    RTS Health Score — RTS Score sheet, Score Total average · 目标≥80分

    Channel MCSR-E Coverage — Σ(Capped Certification) / Σ(Certification Target) from MCSR-E sheet

    Regional Self-Coverage — Training level ≠ "Global TC" headcount / total headcount · face to face record sheet

    ⚠ QE Analysis / 质量上升

    Data source — QE_FTFR Excel · QE sheet · 数据来源：QE_FTFR文件 QE页

    QE Total — Row count · 全部行数

    Open (Unclosed) — Status ≠ "Closed" · Status列不等于Closed

    RTS Intercept Rate — (Closed OR Troubleshooting) / All · 目标≥70%

    QE Timeline — Close Date − Open Date in days · 封闭天数

    Region Filter — Region II column (linked to top REGION tab) · Region II列

    Product Filter — Product Line column · 产线列

    Monthly Trend — Group by Month column · 按Month分组

    Intercept Rate by Region — (Closed+TS)/Total per region · 各大区（拦截数/总量）

    🔧 FTFR Analysis / 维修分析

    Data sources — FTFR-BD (repair detail, past 90 days) + FTFR-Customer (customer-level FTFR) · 双表

    Overall / VIP1 FTFR — Average of FTFR column; VIP1+SVIP subset · FTFR-Customer均值，目标≥70%

    SLA ≤24h / ≤48h — BD: If≤24h or If≤48h column = 1 / total BD rows · SVIP ≤24h ≥90%, VIP1 ≤24h ≥80%, VIP2 ≤48h ≥80%

    Repeat Repair — Same Serial No. appearing ≥2 times in 90-day BD · 同序列号90天内≥2次

    L2→L3 Drill-down — When a region is selected, charts switch from L2 to L3 sub-regions · 选区域后切换子区域

    Product Filter Bridge — BD Sub-Product Line → matched CU customer set → FTFR · 产线通过CU客户集桥接

    VIP High-frequency — FTFR-Customer: VIP1/SVIP with 90-day order count >10 · VIP1+SVIP且90天工单>10

    📚 Training / 培训赋能

    Data source — face to face record sheet · 面对面培训记录

    Sessions — Unique Class ID count · 唯一Class ID数量

    Trainees — Rows where "if pass training" IN {Y, N} · 参与考核的学员

    MCSR Obtain Rate — "if obtain MCSR" = Y / trainees · 目标≥70%

    Regional Self-Coverage — Training level ≠ "Global TC" / total rows · 目标≥90%

    Scheduled Training Rate — Level IN {Global/Regional/National/Channel TC} / total · 目标≥50%

    Avg Days to MCSR — AVERAGEX(IFERROR(VALUE(interval time), BLANK())); 0 included, text excluded · 0包含，文字排除

    Trainee Type Filter — Trainee type column: channel / internal · 渠道/内部

    Levels — HQ=Global TC · Regional=Regional TC · Certified Channel=National/Channel TC · Other=Non-certified

    🏅 Technical Capability / 技术能力 — Full Logic

    CS Health Score (CSE / Service KA) — CS Score sheet (header row 2), Score Total average · 目标≥75分

    Score Sub-items (CSE) — Tech Assessment + MCST Coverage + Tech Seminar + Tech Case + Training Delivery + MCSR Coverage (6 items, see weights in source sheet) · 6项子维度

    Score Sub-items (Service KA) — Recurring Biz Assessment + Recurring Biz Course + MCSR Coverage + Tech Assessment + Tech Seminar (5 items) · 5项子维度

    RTS Health Score — RTS Score sheet (header row 1), Score Total average · 目标≥80分

    Score Sub-items (RTS) — Recurring Biz Course + Tech Assessment + MCST Coverage + Tech Case + Training Delivery (5 items) · 5项

    Technical Seminar — technical seminar sheet; Score=0: absent (counts against rate); Score=blank: new employee (excluded from denominator) · 0=缺勤计入，空=新员工排除

    Channel MCSR-E Coverage — MCSR-E sheet: Σ(Capped Certification) / Σ(Certification Target) · 目标≥70%

    MCSR-E Gap — "Gap Qty" column, grouped by Sub-Product Line and Region III · Gap Qty列

    New Model CS MCSR Coverage — New Models Coverage sheet: count of (region × model) cells where MCSR>0 / cells where shipped>0 · 区域×机型维度覆盖率

    CS MCSR Coverage Rate — CS MCSR sheet: "if already obtain"=1 / total rows (CSE+Service KA) · 目标≥70%

    CS MCSR Plan Completion — (if planning=1 AND obtain=1) / (if planning=1) · 今年计划完成率，目标≥50%

    CS MCST Coverage Rate — MCST sheet: CSE+Service KA: obtain=1 / total · 目标≥40%

    RTS MCST Coverage Rate — MCST sheet: RTSE role: obtain=1 / total · 目标≥60%

    L3 Drill-down — When region selected, health score / MCSR / MCST / MCSR-E Gap charts switch to L3 sub-regions · 选区域后自动切换三级

    Filters — Top REGION tabs (linked to all charts) + Product Line tabs (linked to MCSR-E and NPI) · 区域联动全页，产线联动MCSR-E/NPI

    Color coding (totals) — Green ≥ target; Yellow ≥ 70% of target; Red < 70% of target · 绿≥目标，黄≥70%目标，红<70%目标

    🔗 Common Filter Logic / 通用筛选逻辑

    Region Filter (top REGION tabs) — Links to all sub-pages. Maps to "II Region" / "Region II" / "Tier II Region" columns in source data. ALL = show everything · 联动所有页面和图表，ALL=全量显示

    L2 → L3 Drill-down — On Capability and FTFR pages, selecting a specific region switches charts from 7 macro-regions (L2) to sub-regions (L3) for finer analysis · 技术能力页和维修分析页，选区域后自动切换子区域

    Product Line Filter — Each sub-page has its own product line filter. FTFR bridges BD → CU customer set; Training filters "Production line" column; Capability filters MCSR-E product line · 各子页独立产线筛选

    Trainee Type Filter (Training page) — Trainee type column: channel (distributor engineers) / internal (direct engineers) · 渠道/内部工程师

    VIP Filter (FTFR page) — VIP column in FTFR-BD: N / VIP2 / VIP1 / SVIP · 维修分析页专用

    Download — All detail tables have a CSV download button (UTF-8 with BOM for Excel compatibility) · 所有明细表支持CSV下载

    📁 导入数据 / Upload Data

    上传两个 Excel 文件 / Upload two Excel files:
    ① QE_FTFR_YYYYMMDD.xlsx  ② RTS_training_data_YYYYMMDD.xlsx

    拖拽文件到此处 / Drag & Drop
    或点击选择 / or Click to Select
